title: Address GitHub code-quality comment on PR #193

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Collected github-code-quality bot comments on PR #193 (4 findings): 3 unused symbol warnings and 1 broad except in MCP/tools/procedure/procedures.py. Creating fix branch and applying minimal behavior-preserving fixes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented fix on branch bugfix/pr-193-code-quality-comments: replaced broad except blocks in MCP/tools/procedure/procedures.py with explicit JSONDecodeError/TypeError/ValueError handling. Running targeted procedure tool tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed: GitHub code-quality finding on PR #193 addressed via PR #197 and merged; fix is now in main.
